name: claude-code
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        anthropics /

      claude-code  

    
      Claude Code is an agentic coding tool that lives in your terminal, understands your codebase, and helps you code faster by executing routine tasks, explaining complex code, and handling git workflows - all through natural language commands.
summary: Claude Code 是一个基于终端的智能编程助手，能理解代码库并通过自然语言命令帮助开发者快速执行常规任务、解释复杂代码及处理 Git 工作流，显著提升编码效率。

name: VoxCPM
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        OpenBMB /

      VoxCPM  

    
      VoxCPM2: Tokenizer-Free TTS for Multilingual Speech Generation, Creative Voice Design, and True-to-Life Cloning
summary: VoxCPM是一个支持多语言语音生成、创意声音设计和逼真语音克隆的无分词器TTS系统，其创新技术值得关注。

name: stable-worldmodel
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        galilai-group /

      stable-worldmodel  

    
      A platform for reproducible world model research and evaluation
summary: 该项目是一个用于可复现世界模型研究和评估的平台，值得关注因为它为复杂环境下的模型研究提供了标准化工具和框架。

name: train-llm-from-scratch
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        FareedKhan-dev /

      train-llm-from-scratch  

    
      A straightforward method for training your LLM, from downloading data to generating text.
summary: 该项目提供从数据下载到文本生成的完整流程，教你如何从零开始训练自己的大语言模型，适合想深入了解LLM原理的开发者。

name: MoneyPrinterTurbo
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        harry0703 /

      MoneyPrinterTurbo  

    
      利用AI大模型，一键生成高清短视频 Generate short videos with one click using AI LLM.
summary: MoneyPrinterTurbo是一个基于AI大模型的Python项目，能够一键生成高清短视频，因其高效自动化内容创作能力而值得关注。

name: RuView
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        ruvnet /

      RuView  

    
      π RuView turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time spatial intelligence, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.
summary: RuView利用WiFi信号实现实时空间感知、生命体征监测和存在检测，无需任何摄像头。该项目创新性地将日常WiFi转化为非接触式传感工具，在隐私保护和智能感知领域具有突破意义。

name: MOSS-TTS
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        OpenMOSS /

      MOSS-TTS  

    
      MOSS‑TTS Family is an open‑source speech and sound generation model family from MOSI.AI and the OpenMOSS team. It is designed for high‑fidelity, high‑expressiveness, and complex real‑world scenarios, covering stable long‑form speech, multi‑speaker dialogue, voice/character design, environmental sound effects, and real‑time streaming TTS.
summary: MOSS-TTS是MOSI.AI和OpenMOSS团队开发的开源语音与音效生成模型家族，专注于高保真、高表现力的复杂场景应用，涵盖长文本朗读、多角色对话、音色定制、环境音效及实时流式合成。

name: harness
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        revfactory /

      harness  

    
      A meta-skill that designs domain-specific agent teams, defines specialized agents, and generates the skills they use.
summary: 该项目是一个设计领域特定智能体团队、定义专业代理并生成其使用技能的元技能框架，值得关注因其能高效构建定制化智能体系统。
